title: sm status data payload
description: Project dashboard snapshot produced without running any gates. Reports configuration, the gate inventory with historical results, workflow position, and (when available) CI and baseline-snapshot state. This is an observatory: the envelope status is always 'info' and exit_code is 0.

project_root.description: Absolute path to the inspected project root.

config_file.description: Path where the project config is expected (.sb_config.json).

swabbing_timeout.description: Per-gate timeout from config, or null when unset.

disabled.description: Sorted list of disabled gate names.

scope.description: Source-file scope tally (files/lines). Present only when the project has source files.

ci.description: Most recent CI signal for the working branch. Present only when CI data exists.

recent_run.description: Summary of the most recent local validation run. Present only when a run artifact exists.

baseline_snapshot.description: Persisted baseline snapshot data. Present only when a baseline exists.

baseline_snapshot_generated.description: Details of a snapshot generated during this invocation (--generate-baseline-snapshot).

skip_reason.description: Why the gate does not apply. Present only when applicable is false.

last_result.description: Status of the most recent recorded run of this gate.

history.description: Up to the last 10 recorded result statuses, oldest first.
